offline.title: No internet connection
offline.body: The app works offline for previously cached content.

admin.confirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

onboarding.slide1Title: Heritage that lives in the mountain
onboarding.slide1Text: Discover the depth of Ouarsenis through thousands of documents, photos and stories.
onboarding.slide2Text: Thousands of pages of manuscripts and academic research at your fingertips.
onboarding.slide3Text: Listen, watch, read — a cinematic experience of collective memory.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your journey through the mountain's memory
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account and save your reading and listening progress
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link.
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox — a reset link has been sent.

about.title: About
about.intro: A digital project that preserves the cultural and literary heritage of Ouarsenis and presents it through an interactive, premium experience — combining academic books, folk tales, heritage figures, places, and audio/video recordings.
about.vision: Bring Algerian heritage within reach of everyone through a cinematic mobile experience.
about.team: A group of volunteer researchers, designers and developers serving collective memory.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: We respect our users' privacy and only collect what is required to operate the app.
privacy.data: Email and name on signup, plus anonymous usage analytics to improve the service.
privacy.storage: We use browser storage to save preferences, bookmarks and reading positions.
privacy.rights: You can delete your account and data at any time from the app settings.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: By using the app, you agree to the following terms:
terms.usage: Content is for educational and cultural purposes only. Commercial redistribution is not allowed without permission.
terms.rights: All content remains the property of its owners. The app is a platform for heritage preservation.
terms.account: You are responsible for securing your account and any activity on it.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.name: Name
contact.sent: We received your message — we'll get back soon

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.errorBody: Something went wrong. You can try again or head back home.
